content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Roboteer
description: Legendary Hyperion class mod for Gaige the Mechromancer, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Potent as a Pony, Made of Sterner Stuff, 20% Cooler, Strength of Five Gorillas, Annoyed Android. Trades some cooldown for melee damage.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. Below-level-50 versions cannot be obtained legitimately.

special.description: At max level: +31% action skill cooldown rate, +51% melee damage.
special.title: Science, my sweetest valentine!
